name: Viridescent Daydream || Pure Vanilla Cookie
description:
Walking through a forest where fae preside is usually bad idea. This one looks so sweet, sitting in dappled sunlight. Can they truly be so untrustworthy?

NSFW intro in second starter if you just wanna skip to the good stuff.

Viridescent Daydream themed Pure Vanilla! No love potion coded in but you can add it to the chat memory if you want. Viri is a FAE which means you can easily play into the doting caretaker type of scenario or the much darker kind of scenario thus the Fluff and Dead Dove tag, both are possible!

{tags: Cookie Run Kingdom, CRK, Pure Vanilla Cookie, Fae, Faerie, Magical)
creator: xwcx
